text: Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! 🎉 You're all set as a member. Feel free to explore, ask questions, and get involved!
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! 🎉 You're now an event helper. Looking forward to your contributions to our community events!
Welcome, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience and guidance will be invaluable to our community!
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a moderator. Thanks for volunteering to help keep our space safe and welcoming!
